'''Andy Mushynsky''' was an inker for many of [[Dark Horse Comics]]' ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]].

{{Bio-stub}}

*[[Star Wars: Droids Special 1|''Star Wars: Droids Special'' 1]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 3]]
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 4|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 4]]
